questions.question: Does downloads.yml contain a 'flutter' section with entries for all three Dart versions (3.7, 3.6, 3.5), each with a 'version' and 'url' field pointing to ARM64 Linux Flutter SDK?
questions.actionable_check: Read src/clauded/downloads.yml and verify flutter section exists with versions 3.7, 3.6, 3.5 containing url and version fields; URLs must contain 'arm64' and 'flutter_infra_release'
evidence_required: URL values for each dart version
questions.pass_criteria: All three dart version keys present in flutter.versions with valid HTTPS ARM64 URLs

questions.question: Do all three dart role task files (dart/, dart-alpine/, dart-ubuntu/) contain Flutter installation tasks that download and extract the Flutter SDK?
questions.actionable_check: Read all three dart role main.yml files; verify each has set_fact for flutter_download, get_url for flutter tar.xz, unarchive task, and cleanup task
questions.pass_criteria: All three role files contain complete Flutter installation block after Dart installation

questions.question: Does /etc/profile.d/dart.sh in each role include /usr/local/flutter/bin in the PATH?
questions.actionable_check: Check the 'copy' task in each dart role that writes /etc/profile.d/dart.sh; verify /usr/local/flutter/bin is in the PATH content
evidence_required: PATH content in dart.sh across all three roles
questions.pass_criteria: /usr/local/flutter/bin appears in PATH before DART_SDK/bin in all three role files

questions.question: Does constants.py have the updated Dart label that mentions Flutter?
questions.actionable_check: Read src/clauded/constants.py and verify LANGUAGE_CONFIG['dart']['label'] contains 'Flutter' and 'flutter'
questions.pass_criteria: Label contains 'Flutter' and 'flutter' (e.g., 'Dart + Flutter (dart, flutter, pub)')

questions.question: Do the tests verify the Flutter download metadata and updated dart label?
questions.actionable_check: Check test_downloads.py for flutter section tests and test_constants.py for updated dart label assertions
questions.pass_criteria: At least one test for flutter section in downloads.yml and at least one test for Flutter in dart label; all tests pass

mandatory_questions.question: Do all 885 tests pass (884 baseline + 1 new flutter test) with no failures?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Run uv run pytest tests/ and verify exit code 0 with at least 885 passing tests
evidence_required: pytest output showing all tests pass
